response: {"subfigures":[{"label":"a","description":"Pie charts showing experimental success results for 209 eCLIP experiments in K562 (top) and HepG2 (bottom) cell lines, with colors indicating the amount of amplification (eCT) required to obtain 100 fmoles of library. 102 experiments pass validation metrics and are deposited at ENCODE.","plot_type":"pie","plot_category":"categorical","x_axis":null,"y_axis":null,"color_variable":"eCT (amplification level required)","error_bars":"none","sample_size":"209","shows_individual_points":false,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP"],"supplementary_tables":["Supplementary Table 2"],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":"cell line (K562, HepG2)"},{"label":"b","description":"Scatter plot where each point represents a successful eCLIP experiment, with the x-axis showing the eCT of the best replicate (replicate 1) and the y-axis showing the increase in eCT between replicate 1 and replicate 2 (indicating decreased efficiency in the second replicate). Seven IgG-only eCLIP experiments are indicated by black lines at 75 kDa intervals from 25 to 250 kDa.","plot_type":"scatter","plot_category":"relational","x_axis":{"label":"eCT of best replicate (replicate 1)","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"y_axis":{"label":"Increase in eCT (replicate 1 to replicate 2)","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"color_variable":"IgG-only vs. standard eCLIP experiment","error_bars":"none","sample_size":null,"shows_individual_points":true,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP"],"supplementary_tables":[],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":null},{"label":"c","description":"Distribution of the fraction of usable (non-PCR duplicated) reads out of all uniquely mapped reads, compared across eCLIP, public iCLIP experiments (ENCODE consortium and published datasets), and 152 published CLIP datasets (PAR-CLIP, HITS-CLIP), shown as individual points overlaid on a kernel density smoothed histogram.","plot_type":"kde","plot_category":"distribution","x_axis":{"label":"Fraction of usable (non-PCR duplicated) reads out of uniquely mapped reads","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"y_axis":{"label":"Density","scale":"linear","units":null,"data_type":"continuous","is_inverted":false},"color_variable":"Assay/dataset type (eCLIP, iCLIP, CLIP)","error_bars":"none","sample_size":"eCLIP: 209; iCLIP (ENCODE): 12; iCLIP (published): 115; CLIP (published): 152","shows_individual_points":true,"data_source":null,"assays":["eCLIP","iCLIP","PAR-CLIP","HITS-CLIP"],"supplementary_tables":[],"statistical_test":null,"facet_variable":null}]}
